case_for: Adams has shown a high ceiling this season (26.0 in wk2, 15.6 in wk18) indicating he can produce WR1 numbers when targets flow his way
case_against: Recent form is trending downward with three straight sub-10 point games (8.0, 6.0, 9.4) and the pregame projection of 9.4 sits well below the 12.0 threshold
